title: Markdown to Plain Text Renderer
description: Build a renderer that converts a subset of Markdown into formatted plain text. Handle headings, bold, italic, code blocks, lists, and links.
requirements: Convert # headings to UPPERCASE with underlines
Convert - list items to bullet points
hints: Process the input line by line first, then handle inline formatting
Check for headings by looking for # at the start of a line
For inline formatting, iterate through characters and look for marker pairs
Handle ** before * to avoid ambiguity (greedy matching)
Use a state machine approach: track whether you are inside bold, italic, etc.
bonusChallenge: Add support for fenced code blocks (```). Handle nested formatting like **bold *and italic* text**. Add numbered lists.
